name: @ge/evalkit
description: The eval-generation and eval-metrics engine: behavioral compiler (spec envelope → graph → case expansion → set-cover selection), perturbation/adversarial case synthesis, the eval-artifact emitters (ADK evalsets, agents-cli datasets, generated-workspace eval configs), lexical-similarity metrics, and eval statistics (Wilson/bootstrap/pass@k/flakiness). Deterministic by contract — no clock, no randomness. Leaf package: imports only @ge/std, yaml, and zod, never apps/* or tools/*.
